<path>/private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>
1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { add } from './src/math.mjs'
4: 
5: for (let index = 0; index < 80; index += 1) {
6:   test(`add case ${index}`, () => {
7:     assert.equal(add(index, 2), index + 2)
8:   })
9: }

(End of file - total 9 lines)
</content>
state.title: bench-targets/large-log/math.test.mjs

part.text: I'll diagnose and fix the failing tests in the large-log benchmark. Let me start by examining the files involved.

metadata.diff:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

filediff.patch:
Index: /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
===================================================================
--- /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
+++ /private/tmp/tokenwarden-bench/2026-06-20T06-38-17-288Z/baseline-large-test-log-debug-2/repo/bench-targets/large-log/src/math.mjs
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
 export function add(a, b) {
-  return a - b
+  return a + b
 }

part.text:
The test expects `add(index, 2)` to return `index + 2`, but the `add` function in `math.mjs` incorrectly returns `a - b` instead of `a + b`. This causes all 80 tests to fail.

**Root cause:** Line 2 in `math.mjs` has a logic error - it returns `a - b` instead of `a + b`.

**Fix:** Change the return value to `a + b`:
